properties:
select * from 학생
insert into 학생 (student_id, student_pw, student_no, student_name, student_address, student_email, student_phone) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
insert into 교수 (professor_id, professor_name, professor_no, professor_address, professor_email, professor_phone, professor_pw) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM 교수 WHERE professor_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM 교수 WHERE professor_email = ?
select count(*) from 학생 where student_id = ?
SELECT student_id, student_name FROM 학생 WHERE student_id = ? AND student_pw = ?
insert into 교수 (professor_id, professor_name, professor_no, professor_address, professor_email, professor_phone, professor_pw) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT professor_id, professor_name FROM 교수 WHERE professor_id = ? AND professor_pw = ?
-- 학생 기능
select * from 학생
select c.class_no, c.class_name, c.class_time, c.class_type, c.class_room, c.class_point, pr.professor_name from 강의 c join 교수 pr on c.professor_id = pr.professor_id
insert into 수강 (student_id, class_no, enroll_date) values (?, ?, now());
select en.student_id, st.student_name, en.class_no, c.class_name, c.class_time, c.class_type, c.class_room, pr.professor_name, en.enroll_date, (select count(*) from 수강 where class_no = en.class_no) as current_count from 수강 en join 학생 st on en.student_id = st.student_id join 강의 c on en.class_no = c.class_no join 교수 pr on c.professor_id = pr.professor_id where en.student_id = ? order by class_no asc
delete from 수강 where student_id = ? and class_no = ?
select c.class_task, c.class_name from 강의 c join 수강 en on c.class_no = en.class_no where en.student_id = ? and c.class_no = ?
select en.score, c.class_name from 수강 en join 강의 c on en.class_no = c.class_no where en.student_id = ? and en.class_no = ?
select c.class_name, c.class_time from 강의 c join 수강 en on c.class_no = en.class_no where en.student_id = ? and substring(c.class_time, 1, 1) = substring((select class_time from 강의 where class_no = ?), 1, 1) and substring((select class_time from 강의 where class_no = ?), 4, 1) >= (substring(c.class_time, 2, 1) and (substring(c.class_time, 4, 1)) >= substring((select class_time from 강의 where class_no = ?), 2, 1))
select c.class_name, en.score, c.class_point from 수강 en join 강의 c on en.class_no = c.class_no where student_id = ?
SELECT class_no, class_name, class_point, class_time, class_room, class_type, class_task, professor_id FROM 강의 WHERE professor_id = ?
SELECT s.student_id, s.student_name, e.score, e.status FROM 수강 e JOIN 학생 s ON e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE e.class_no = ?
UPDATE 강의 SET class_task = ? WHERE class_no = ? AND professor_id = ?
UPDATE 수강 SET score = ? WHERE class_no = ? AND student_id = ?
select student_name as NAME, student_id as ID, '학생' as TYPE -- 모든 행의 type 컬럼에 '학생' 구분 추가 from 학생 union all select professor_name as NAME, professor_id as ID, '교수' as TYPE from 교수
select * from 학생 where student_id = ?
update 학생 set student_name = ?, student_address = ?, student_email = ?, student_phone = ?, student_pw = ? where student_id = ?
